name: With Coffee
overview: The web drama sponsored by La Marzocco Korea is a drama about love stories such as sweet and sour coffee, which was the most intense and special summer romance between a 26 years old job-seeker couple Ha Min and So Myung.

trailers.title: [그날의 커피 : 티저] 우리 사랑할 수 있을까? _ 웹드라마
